concept: Conversation / The Presence of Mindful Clarity
description: The natural, reciprocal flow of thoughts and ideas between people in shared presence. It is less formal than dialogue and is the primary way community is woven through speech.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'no' (mind), 'i' (clarity), and 'ka' (to be present). The word's structure suggests 'clarity of mind in shared presence.' This distinguishes it from 'noa' (talk) by adding a layer of mindful presence and clarity, elevating it from simple chatter.
